---
name: design-system-enforcer
description: Enforces design-system consistency. Use to identify deviations in tokens, spacing, radii, typography, color, and component primitives. Keywords: design-system, tokens, spacing, radii, typography, primitives, consistency.
---

# Functionality
Audits UI for strict design-system adherence. Identifies inconsistencies in spacing scale, radii, typography scale, color tokens, iconography, and component primitives.

# When to Use
Use when checking for design-system drift, token misuse, inconsistent spacing, incorrect radii, typography mismatches, or ad-hoc styling.

# Instructions
Compare UI against expected tokens → identify deviations → categorize issues → do not propose new tokens or redesigns.

# Output Format
- Spacing Scale Deviations  
- Radii Inconsistencies  
- Typography Scale Issues  
- Color Token Misuse  
- Primitive Component Drift  
- Iconography Inconsistencies  

# Example
“Audit this screen for design-system consistency.”
